item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Another Rolls Royce has arrived, 25th April
item.description:
Another vintage blue rolls royce has arrived to join the other 3 that have been left not moving for months. These take up several parking spaces for visitors and residents. There is now a row of four cars.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, Dulwich Village, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road sign, 25th April
item.description:
This road sign has been left behind following road works in Abbey Wood Road. It is no longer necessary and is obstructing the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abbey Terrace, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: SE corner of Broadhurst Gardens x Priory Road junction, 25th April
item.description:
The Apple Tree looks under chronic stress, maybe dead? The canopy is sparse with a lot of dieback, and there are retained, shrivelled fruits indicating possible water stress. The trunk shows areas of bark loss and poor wound closure, which - my guess - is not typical for a healthy specimen. There is no obvious immediate safety risk, but the overall condition suggests ongoing decline since the last inspection (Sept 2024). A follow-up inspection and basic tree pit maintenance (clearance and mulching) might give it a fighting chance (if it's not too late).
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 121, Priory Road, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown hedge when walking on a foot path., 25th April
item.description:
Over grown hedge. Causing issues when walking pass on the foot path. Reversing and pulling off drive. Blocking view of children or people walking pass. We live on a busy school road and now is causing an issue. The neighbour is aggressive and will not cut the hedge back.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Berwick Crescent, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 364-366, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned for 18 months, 25th April
item.description:
Abandoned car you still haven't dealt with despite it having no tax, no Mot and being dumped for 18 months. It needs removing now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belmont Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
